# CMakeLists.txt for mission "Editor Mission"
# Generated by op2-codegen-editor; uses the TitanAPI library at ../../TitanAPI/.
#
# Windows (MSVC):
#     cmake -S . -B build -G "Visual Studio 18 2026" -A Win32
#     cmake --build build --config Release
#     Output: build/Release/cEditorMission.dll
#
# Linux (MinGW cross-compile):
#     cmake -S . -B build \
#       -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=i686-w64-mingw32-gcc \
#       -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=i686-w64-mingw32-g++ \
#       -DCMAKE_RC_COMPILER=i686-w64-mingw32-windres \
#       -DCMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME=Windows \
#       -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
#     cmake --build build
#     Output: build/cEditorMission.dll

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(Editor_Mission VERSION 1.0.0 LANGUAGES CXX RC DESCRIPTION "TitanAPI mission: Editor Mission")

if(NOT MSVC AND NOT MINGW)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Outpost 2 requires a Win32 target. Use MSVC (Windows) or MinGW i686-w64-mingw32 (Linux cross-compile).")
endif()
if(MSVC AND NOT CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 4)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "Must be a 32-bit (x86) build. Re-configure with -A Win32.")
endif()

set(RC_OUTPUT_NAME "cEditorMission")
configure_file(version.rc.in "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc" @ONLY)

add_library(cEditorMission SHARED
  mission.cpp
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/version.rc"
  op2_mission.hpp
  op2_log.hpp
  op2_crash.hpp
)

target_include_directories(cEditorMission PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../TitanAPI/TitanAPI/include")

target_compile_definitions(cEditorMission PRIVATE TITANAPI_VERSION="${PROJECT_VERSION}")

if(MSVC)
  target_compile_options(cEditorMission PRIVATE /std:c++23preview)
  set_property(TARGET cEditorMission PROPERTY MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
else()
  # MinGW cross-compile: target Win32 ABI, static runtime to avoid mingw DLL deps
  target_compile_options(cEditorMission PRIVATE -std=c++23 -m32)
  target_link_options(cEditorMission PRIVATE -m32 -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++)
endif()

set_target_properties(cEditorMission PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "cEditorMission" PREFIX "")
